Build a Model

build-a-model.Rmd

This walkthrough goes from raw data and observations to an exported model bundle.

Step 1. Initialise the workspace 

library(moover)
init_workspace()

Step 2. Create a spec 

spec <- create_spec(
  labels = list(
    tech_file = "tech.csv",
    path = "observations.csv"
  ),
  optimise = list(
    enabled = TRUE
  )
)

Step 3. Run the full workflow 

run_pipeline(spec, stage = "all")

This will:

  • validate and preview the raw data
  • build canonical epoch features
  • optimise candidate models
  • train the selected model
  • export the model bundle and test vectors

Beginner option 

wizard_train()

On this page
